titleStmt.title: SII 24.460: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 460. (A.R. No. 13 of 1936-37.) III PRĀKĀRA, INNER WALL.

summary.p: Registers the gift of the village Chintāmaṇi by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāja-Sadāśivadēva-Mahārāja to Śrīśaila-pūrṇāchārya Tātāchārya alias Avukku Tiruvēṅkaḍayaṅgār who, in turn, made it over to god Raṅganātha for offerings in the manner in which they were formerly conducted during the time of Nalantigaḻ Nārāyaṇa-Jīyar, for the merit of the Rāya and the king. Refers to the erosion of the river Kāvērī into Śrīraṅgam and to its diversion near Chintāmaṇi during the time of a Chōḷa king, and to the compensation in land in the Koḷak[u] ṭṭai village granted to the brāhmaṇa residents of Chintāmaṇi. The record is dated Śaka 1467, Viśvāvasu Phālguṇa, śu, 7 Monday, Rōhiṇi corresponding to 1546, A.D. February 8, Monday śu. 8 (not 7); ·43, ·79.
Published in Epigraphia Indica, Vol. XXIX, pp. 71 ff.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
setuvandye śakasyābde śrīmān veṅkaṭa deśikaḥ . cin=tāmaṇimahāgrāmam śrīraṅgeśāya dattavān .
śubhamastu . svastiśrīmanmahāirājādhiirāja Irājaparameśvara śrīvira pratāpa śrīmat sadāśiva Irāyamahāirāyar pṛthuvi Irājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 4 100 6 10 7 Itaṉmel cellāniṉṟa viśvāvasu samvatsarattu chālgunamāsattu śuklapakṣattu saptamiyum soma
vāramum peṟṟa rohiṇi nakṣatrattu nāḷ teṉ karai pāṇṭi kulācaṉivaḷaṉāṭṭu viḻāvaṟā viti (viti) vaḷaṉāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkan tiruppati śrīraṅganāthatevar śrīpaṇṭārat tukku śrīśailapūrṇācāryya tātācāryyarāṉa Oḷavukkut tiruveṅ kaṭayaṅkār śilāśāsanam paṇṇi samarpitta
paṭi . teṉkarai Irājagambhīravaḷanāṭṭu tañcāvūr Ucāvaṭi Uṟaiyūr kūṟṟattu kiḻpalāṟṟu tevatāṉattukku meṟku tiruccirāppaḷḷi maṇkoṭṭaikku vaṭakku kiṟuṣṇarāya Alavantapuram Uṟaiyūr veṭṭikku kiḻakku tirukkāverikkun teṟku Iṉṉāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭṭu muṉṉāḷ tiruvaraṅkan tiruppati piṭākai
yākki piṉpu nalan tikaḻ nārāyaṇajiyat tiruvaraṅkan tiruppatiyai yāṟukoḷḷukiṟatu kaṇṭu mel mukam Āṉai kāttāṉ karaikku yantrastāpanamum paṇṇi śāstāvai- yum pratiṣṭhittu kiḻiyāṟuṅ kiḻittu teṉtirukkāveri malaṭu ceyvittu malaṭaṉāṟu keṭa vaṭakarai nāṇal naṭavum kiḻiyāṟṟukku teṉkarai ṉāṇal
naṭāmal cintāmaṇiyil Iṭaṅkoṭukkavum kaṭṭaḷaiiṭṭu cintāmaṇi mahājaṉaṅkaḷukku koḷakuṭṭai grāmam parivaṟtaṉai paṇṇik koṭukkaiyil coḻaṉ Aḻaippiñca sanniyāciyānavaṉ sarvabhūta selṛhārddamuṇṭāy Irukka veṇṭi Irukka Ippaṭi brāhmaṇahimsai paṇṇalāmo Eṉṟu keḻka brāhmaṇahim saikku Ā
jñai Iṭukiṟa paradevatai tāṉe nnimittakṛtam pāpamapi dharmmāya kalpate . Eṉṟu śrībhagavatgītaiyile coṉṉatu kaṇṭu ceytoṅ kāṇumeṉṉa Atu keṭṭu coḻaṉ sanetāṣittu Ituve niṉaivāṉāl Intappāvam Aṭikkaḻañcu poṉ peṟumeṉṟu śrī Iraṅkaṉāt tevaṟku tāraivāttu ko
ṭuttatukku piṉpu neṭunāḷaikku melākac cila kālam paṇṭāravāṭaiyāy tiṟantu poṉa cintāmaṇigrāmam 1-kku tāṉamāniyam 5(1/2) nañce rūpāy 7(1/4)2pa puñce rūpāy 7nta Āka rūpāy 100 4 10 2pa Itu kku pon_ 100 4 10 6 cintāmaṇi nattañ ceyttalai ttiṭar vāstu vāstuceṣam Āṟu praāpti vāykkāl prāpti veḷḷāṅkuṭi Iruppu
(lil) maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa cakalacamutāyaprāptiyum Uṭpaṭṭa nidhinikṣepajalapāṣāṇādi Aṣṭabhokatejasvāmyaṅkaḷum Uḷpaṭa namakku nammuṭaiya priyaśiṣya- nāya svastiśrīmanmahāmaṇṭaleśvara somakulatilakāyamāṉanāna Irāmairājā sadāśivarāya mahāirāyar
kaiyil Ekabhogyamāy dhārai vāṟpittu tarukaiyil nāṉ pūrvannalantikaḻ nārāyaṇajīyar Iṭṭa kaṭṭaḷai paṭiyile perumāḷukke poliūṭṭāka Irāyaṟkum Irājāvukkum dharmmamāka samarpiñca Inta khiloddhāraṇam paṇṇiṉagrāmattil Utaiyaṅ koṇṭu
perumāḷ dinam nālu taḷikai Amutuceytaruḷi Itil nibaddhi kaṭṭaḷai Aṟṟapaṭi viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu caturtthāmśam nālu taḷikaiyile Oru taḷikaiyum Aḷakku tiruveṅkaṭayaṅkār cantāṉa paramparai Āka candrādityavaraiyum Aṉupavittu
k koṇṭu śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷ Amutu ceytaruḷumpaṭikku naṭakkakkaṭavatākavum Ippaṭikku Inta cilāśāśāna[ m Eḻutina*] maikku koyilkkaṇakku śrīraṅkanārāyaṇapriyaṉ Eḻuttu . dānapālanadhormmadhye dānā(t)chśreyonupālanam . dānāt svarggamavāpno
ti pālanāt Acyutam padam .
Aḷakku tāttai Ayyaṅkār san=tāna paramparaiyāka Aṉupavittukkoḷḷakkaṭava rākavum
Digital edition of SII 24.460 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
